meta.title: Russian Revolution
meta.description: The sealed train, the storming of the Winter Palace, and the 10 days that shook the world. ⚒️⭐

vladimir-lenin.name: Vladimir Lenin
vladimir-lenin.description: The ultimate revolutionary overachiever! 💀⚡ Bald genius, sealed train rider, and architect of the USSR.

leon-trotsky.name: Leon Trotsky
leon-trotsky.description: Creator of the Red Army and proponent of Permanent Revolution. Destiny: Ice pick (unless you save him).

alexander-kerensky.name: Alexander Kerensky
alexander-kerensky.description: Leader of the Provisional Government. Tried to please everyone, ended up pleasing no one.

joseph-stalin.name: Joseph Stalin
joseph-stalin.description: Quiet, bureaucratic, and extremely dangerous. Don't underestimate the Secretary.

menshevik-victory.title: Menshevik Victory: Democracy! 🗳️🐻
menshevik-victory.description: What if Russia became a democratic socialist republic instead of a Soviet one?
menshevik-victory.divergence_description: Moderate socialists defeat Lenin's coup and establish a parliament.
menshevik-victory.present_day_status: The Russian Democratic Federation is a wealthy, social-democratic superpower. Moscow is the cultural capital of Europe. Vladimir Lenin is a minor historical footnote. 🇷🇺🗳️

constituent-assembly.title: Constituent Assembly Meets
constituent-assembly.description: The first democratic parliament in Russian history writes a constitution.

russian-federation.title: Russian Democratic Federation
russian-federation.description: Russia becomes a federal republic similar to the USA but socialist.

hitler-contained.consequence: Hitler is crushed early by a united East and West

trotsky-victory.title: Trotsky Wins: World Revolution! 🌍🔥
trotsky-victory.description: What if Trotsky succeeded Lenin instead of Stalin?
trotsky-victory.divergence_description: Trotsky outmaneuvers Stalin and launches "Permanent Revolution".
trotsky-victory.present_day_status: The United Socialist Republics of Earth (USRE) rule a scarred planet. Mars colonies are named "New Petrograd". The revolution never ends! 🌍🚩

red-army-march.title: The Red Army Marches West
red-army-march.description: Trotsky invades Poland and Germany to support communist uprisings.
red-army-march.impact: Total war with the West begins early.

global-civil-war.title: Global Civil War
global-civil-war.description: The world burns in a conflict between Revolution and Reaction.
global-civil-war.impact: Capitalism collapses or fascism rises everywhere.

fascist-britain.consequence: Britain and US turn to fascism to stop the Red Horde

sealed-train.title: The Sealed Train (1917)
sealed-train.text: Zurich, 1917. The Germans offer you a train ride to Russia. They want you to destabilize the Tsar. Do you take the ticket?

take-train.text: Take the train. The end justifies the means.
take-train.consequence: You arrive at Finland Station. The crowd cheers. The revolution finds its leader.

refuse.text: Refuse German gold. I am no spy!
refuse.consequence: You stay in Switzerland. The Provisional Government stabilizes. Russia becomes a democracy.

july-days.title: The July Days (1917)
july-days.text: The workers are rioting. They want "All Power to the Soviets!" But the time is not ripe. If we fail, the Bolsheviks will be crushed.

calm-crowd.text: Tell them to go home. We must wait.
calm-crowd.consequence: The crowd is angry but disperses. The party survives to fight another day.

lead-revolt.consequence: The army crushes the mob. You are arrested. The Bolsheviks are banned.

october-revolution.title: Red October (1917)
october-revolution.text: The Winter Palace is vulnerable. Kerensky is weak. Trotsky has the Red Guards ready. Do we strike tonight?

seize-power.text: Storm the Palace! History will not forgive delay!
seize-power.consequence: The Ministers are arrested. You have power. Now you must keep it.

wait-congress.text: Wait for the Congress of Soviets to vote.
wait-congress.consequence: The moment passes. Kerensky brings in troops. The coup fails.

brest-litovsk.title: Treaty of Brest-Litovsk (1918)
brest-litovsk.text: The Germans demand huge territory. Trotsky says "Neither War nor Peace." Bukharin wants "Revolutionary War." What do we sign?

sign-treaty.text: Sign the shameful treaty. We need breathing space.
sign-treaty.consequence: We lose Ukraine, but we save the Revolution. Now we focus on the Civil War.

revolutionary-war.consequence: The German army advances. Petrograd falls. The revolution is crushed.

succession-crisis.title: Lenin's Testament (1924)
succession-crisis.text: You are dying. You must choose a successor. Stalin is too rude. Trotsky is too arrogant. Bukharin is too soft. Who gets the ring?

stalin.text: Let Stalin take charge. He gets things done.
stalin.consequence: The Man of Steel rises. The Purges begin along with industrialization.

trotsky.text: Endorse Trotsky. The revolution must expand.
trotsky.consequence: Trotsky purges Stalin. The Red Army prepares for global war.

collective.text: Demand collective leadership. No one man should rule.
collective.consequence: Stalin ignores you. He wins anyway.
